backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map application, with blob storage and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of frontend source files describing each component, hook, and page in the application.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the frontend app, loading SunCalc from CDN and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, QueryClientProvider, and renders LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin control panel component for managing journeys and schedule items, featuring a calendar popover with drag-select date-range and time inputs, plus sub-managers for travel spots, music albums, geoname data, and timezones.
Utility component that exposes the backend actor to window.backend for console-based debugging, logging available commands and the current user's principal and role.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: Component for managing city media albums, supporting file uploads (images/videos) and social media link additions with real-time URL validation and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing geographical city data sourced from Geonames, supporting paginated browsing, search, CSV file import, and CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A reusable heart-based rating component that renders 10 hearts with support for partial fills, hover previews, click-to-rate interactions, and optional read-only display.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-powered 3D interactive globe component with features including timezone overlays, city markers, country labels, solar terminator/twilight rendering, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: A scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog that renders a journey's schedule grouped by day using polaroid-style cards with Comic Sans typography and colorful decorative elements.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: A React component that renders a vintage/retro-styled travel itinerary dialog with a postcard-inspired design, displaying journey schedule items grouped by day using data from the useGetJourneyScheduleWithDays hook.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting location photo info, handling image file selection, upload to blob storage, and persistence via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: An authentication panel component using Internet Identity, providing login/logout functionality with status display, principal ID preview, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that displays travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items as typed markers, with popups showing ratings, media galleries, and social links.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube/Instagram) with carousel navigation and fullscreen support.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin component for managing music albums and songs, supporting CRUD operations on albums and file uploads for songs via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and songs, allowing users to select a song for playback, with an empty state for unauthenticated or no-content scenarios.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component with play/pause, skip, volume, and progress controls that streams songs from blob storage and supports external song selection.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: An admin component for uploading and persisting timezone GeoJSON data to the backend canister, with IndexedDB caching and a manual multi-step verification workflow.
A collapsible panel displaying all journeys grouped by live/upcoming/past status, with expandable itinerary views, schedule item editing, and flight animation/2D map integration.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A full CRUD management component for travel spots, supporting adding/editing/deleting spots with media file uploads and social media link attachments, organized by city with a rating system.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel that aggregates and displays bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type, with icons and colors per category, and callbacks to focus items on a map.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings dialog for website layout preferences, allowing users to toggle the music player and set a default search location, with a live local time display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook for ICP apps, managing login/logout state via AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags through a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A large collection of React Query hooks and utility functions for fetching and mutating backend data (journeys, locations, media, music, schedules, etc.), including geocoding via Nominatim and social media URL validation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (including sidebar and music player colors), and includes utility style rules for heading colors and layout.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year using the standard cosine formula, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that iterates over GeoJSON timezone features and returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) using the Intl API.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data, prioritizing IndexedDB then a backend fetch, with helpers for opening IndexedDB and validating the data structure.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: A utility module for rendering timezone boundary overlays on a 3D globe using Three.js, supporting polygon rendering, antimeridian unwrapping, DST-aware UTC offset matching with quarter-hour precision, and translucent fill meshes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page component that manages state for location search, 2D/3D view toggling, travel spots, music playback, timezone display, and flight animations, rendering map and panel sub-components.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for assigning day labels (D1, D2, …), colors, and human-readable date strings to schedule items based on their chronological day index.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups schedule items by calendar day and sorts them chronologically by time, then builds per-day route coordinate arrays for rendering travel routes on a map.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a 3D globe (World Clock Globe) with pending tasks to move Real/Hourly/Year mode buttons and time display from a bottom-right floating panel into the Sun Effects section of the World Controls panel, while preserving all other UI and functionality.
